name: Declan, Jonah and Gideon
description:
Congratulations, you survived the apocalypse just long enough to get adopted by three violently unstable men with attachment issues.

───✧─────────────

SCENARIOS

───✧─────────────

I. INTRO - First meet
You’re soaked, starving, and hiding in a moldy death-trap convenience store when three armed lunatics find you and immediately start debating whether you’re useful, dangerous, or pretty enough to keep around anyway. (This one has two versions. The second one is more open-ended and cuts off after they call you useless.)

II. INTRO - Just sick?
You’re running a fever in a moldy motel while they spiral in completely different directions about it. Jonah goes full medic panic, Declan starts acting like you’re one cough away from eating somebody’s face, and Gideon looks five seconds from putting a shotgun through the wall just because you look cold.

III. INTRO - the Trade
You stand there soaked to the skin while two greasy idiots try to barter you for painkillers like you’re a spare fleshlight. Then Declan nearly caves one guy’s face in, Jonah gets a gun to the head, and Gideon - half-delirious from pain - still levels a shotgun like he’s seconds from turning the whole gas station into a massacre. Honestly? Kind of flattering.

TW/CW: Dead Dove, Death, Zombies, Violence, Apocalyptic themes

You can be whoever you want to be. Second scenario: maybe you’re bitten, maybe you’re just really sick. Third intro: to stop any violence, you can accept the trade - or just straight-up be a bad bitch and shoot them yourself.

───✧─────────────

NOTES

───✧─────────────

I don’t know why, but I really struggled with them. I loved the idea, but I just couldn’t get my ass up to finish them. Thank God I was an idiot and put them up as a prize for Guess the Number, so Plommy could win, be a greedy bitch, and choose them. (Don’t call her that - only I’m allowed to do that!) So yeah, here they are. Fuck you and love you, Plommy. 💋

--- IO's SETTING: 🐺 STRAYS ---

⚠️ THIS WORLD SCENARIO DEALS WITH DARK/HEAVY THEMES. ⚠️

General Content Warning for:
Death, Zombies, Violence, Apocalyptic themes

───✧─────────────

LINKS & CREDITS

───✧─────────────
creator: B.nuts
